text: Hello. Hello. Hi, how can I help you today? Good afternoon. This is Jacob. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Arizona State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? Yes, so I was asking if you received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan? Yeah, so we're in the special enrollment period for 2026 and a lot of members haven't been notified yet. So I want to help you get this taken care of. You do have both part A and B, right?
